user.title: Connect Solar AI Optimizer
user.description: Enter the Solar AI Optimizer URL and a short-lived pairing code from Settings → Pairing. Advanced: paste API_TOKEN if you cannot generate a pairing code.

data_description.host: Base URL of Solar AI Optimizer (for example http://192.168.1.50:8000).
data_description.pair_code: One-time code from the Solar pairing UI.
data_description.access_token: Use only when pairing is unavailable; leave blank when redeeming a code.
data_description.grid_charge_enable: Optional inverter switch turned on by the HA fail-safe watchdog.
data_description.max_grid_charge_current: Optional inverter number entity set to max amps on fail-safe.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Solar AI Optimizer
reauth_confirm.description: Generate a new pairing code in Solar and enter it here.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Solar AI Optimizer.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Provide a pairing code or a valid API token.

abort.already_configured: This Solar install is already configured.

init.title: Fail-safe options
init.description: Configure Home Assistant entities used when Solar heartbeat becomes stale.
